name: TypeScript React Patterns
description: React patterns with TypeScript for functional components, hooks, and common patterns

patterns.description: React functional component with typed props interface

patterns.name: Component with Children
patterns.description: React component accepting children prop

patterns.name: useState Hook
patterns.description: React useState hook with type annotation

patterns.name: useState with Object
patterns.description: React useState with typed object state

patterns.name: useEffect Hook
patterns.description: React useEffect hook with cleanup

patterns.name: useEffect for Data Fetching
patterns.description: useEffect with async data fetching pattern

patterns.name: useCallback Hook
patterns.description: React useCallback for memoized callbacks

patterns.name: useMemo Hook
patterns.description: React useMemo for memoized values

patterns.name: useRef Hook
patterns.description: React useRef for DOM references

patterns.name: useRef for Mutable Value
patterns.description: React useRef for mutable value storage

patterns.name: useReducer Hook
patterns.description: React useReducer with typed state and actions

patterns.name: Custom Hook
patterns.description: Custom React hook with typed return value

patterns.name: Context Provider
patterns.description: React context with typed value and provider

patterns.name: forwardRef Component
patterns.description: React forwardRef with typed ref and props

patterns.name: React.memo Component
patterns.description: Memoized component with custom comparison

patterns.name: onClick Handler
patterns.description: Typed onClick event handler

patterns.name: onChange Handler
patterns.description: Typed onChange event handler for inputs

patterns.name: onSubmit Handler
patterns.description: Typed onSubmit form handler

patterns.name: Conditional Rendering
patterns.description: Conditional rendering with ternary

patterns.name: Conditional Rendering with Null
patterns.description: Conditional rendering returning null

patterns.name: Map Array Rendering
patterns.description: Render array items with map

patterns.name: Suspense Boundary
patterns.description: React Suspense with fallback

patterns.name: Error Boundary
patterns.description: Error boundary class component

patterns.name: Lazy Component Import
patterns.description: React.lazy for code splitting

patterns.name: useTransition Hook
patterns.description: Non-blocking state updates with concurrent rendering

patterns.name: useId Hook
patterns.description: Generate SSR-safe unique IDs for accessibility

patterns.name: useDeferredValue Hook
patterns.description: Defer expensive re-renders (search filtering, etc.)

patterns.name: useImperativeHandle Hook
patterns.description: Customize ref instance value exposed to parent

patterns.name: useLayoutEffect Hook
patterns.description: Synchronous DOM mutations before paint (tooltips, scroll)

patterns.description: Debug custom hooks in React DevTools

patterns.name: use Hook (React 19)
patterns.description: Read resources (Promises, Context) directly in components
